title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CABAMBANAN BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PAGSANJAN, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO SALVADOR UNSON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2339 / 55 OG No. 39, 8266 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2573, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CABAMBANAN BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF PAGSANJAN, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, TO SALVADOR UNSON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Cabambanan Barrio School in the barrio of Cabambanan, Municipality of Pagsanjan, Province of Laguna, is changed to Salvador Unson Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
